source-test-file-paths.test-command: dotnet test tests/Ordering.UnitTests/Ordering.UnitTests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~OrderAggregateTest --collect:'XPlat Code Coverage' --results-directory ./tests/TestResults && reportgenerator -reports:./tests/TestResults/**/coverage.cobertura.xml -targetdir:./tests/TestResults/CoverageReport -reporttypes:Cobertura
